subject: A pair of weathered hands cradling a glowing, swirling orb of energy or vision
description: Two large, gnarled hands rise from the lower edge of the frame to cup a luminous, swirling orb at center. The orb churns with golden, amber, and bronze energy — bands of light that suggest both a scrying lens and a captured sun. The hands are weathered and aged, fingers slightly bent as if in reverent presentation. The background is a haze of warm earth tones — ochre, sienna, and dark umber — softening into shadow at the edges. Light radiates outward from the orb, casting a glow on the palms and dissolving the surroundings into atmospheric warmth. The composition is centered and ritualistic, evoking divination, prophecy, or the offering of a sacred artifact.
foreground: two cupped hands holding a glowing swirling orb
background: hazy warm-toned atmosphere fading to dark edges
